senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa mutu mmwenga ambaye unagomba naye. 'U' ni 'ni' kpwa Chidigo.

examples.dg: U tayari?
examples.en: Are you ready?
examples.sw: Uko tayari? Basi twende.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala na haki na kuhenda mambo manono mbere za Mlungu na atu.

examples.dg: Uadilifu ni chitu ambacho Mlungu anaronda kpwa atu.
examples.en: Righteousness is something God wants from people.
examples.sw: Uadilifu ni kitu ambacho Mungu anataka kwa watu.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kufundza anafundzi.

examples.dg: Ualimu ni kazi ya hishima sana.
examples.en: Teaching is a very honourable profession.
examples.sw: Ualimu ni kazi ya heshima sana.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mutu wa kuaminiwa na kutimiza ahadi.

examples.dg: Mutu wa uaminifu anapendwa ni atu osi.
examples.en: A trustworthy person is loved by everyone.
examples.sw: Mtu wa uaminifu anapendwa na watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho mutu anatsagula kuhenda bada ya kufikiri.

examples.dg: Wahenda uamuzi wa kuphiya skuli.
examples.en: He made the decision to go to school.
examples.sw: Alifanya uamuzi wa kwenda shule.

senses.definition_dg: Kuonera atu kpwa sababu ya rangi yao, kabila, au chitu chanjina. Kukosera haki.

examples.dg: Mlungu anahukumu atu osi kulengana na mahendo gao bila ubaguzi
examples.en: God judges all people according to their deeds without favouritism
examples.sw: Mungu anahukumu watu wote kulingana na matendo yao bila ubaguzi.

senses.definition_dg: Ukulu au cheo cha kuongoza atu. Uongozi.

examples.dg: Ubaha ni kazi ngumu inayohitaji achili.
examples.en: Leadership is a difficult job that requires wisdom.
examples.sw: Uongozi ni kazi ngumu inayohitaji akili.

senses.definition_dg: Udi unaofukizwa kpwa kunukia vizuri, hasa wakati wa ibada au sherehe.

examples.dg: Wafukiza ubani nyumbani.
examples.en: She burned incense in the house.
examples.sw: Alifukiza ubani nyumbani.

equivalents_sw: the gum of this tree is used

senses.definition_sw: the gum of this tree is used
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya muhi wa msonobari ambao unaganda rakpwe rinatumiwa kpwa dawa.

examples.dg: Muhi wa ubani una ganda ra dawa.
examples.en: The Mexican weeping pine has medicinal resin.
examples.sw: Mti wa ubani una gum ya dawa.

senses.definition_dg: Uphande wa mutu au chitu, si mbere au nyuma.

examples.dg: Kagaluza ubavu achisikira sauti.
examples.en: He turned sideways when he heard a sound.
examples.sw: Aligeuka upande aliposikia sauti.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa njira ya kuangaliya uphande, si mbere kpwa mbere.

examples.dg: Wanyendeka ubavu-bavu kpwa sababu ya njira nyiru.
examples.en: He walked sideways because of the narrow path.
examples.sw: Alitembea kando kando kwa sababu ya njia nyembamba.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kurema kukubali neno ra mutu munjina. Kukaidi.

examples.dg: Ubishi wa mwana uhu unamremesa.
examples.en: This child's stubbornness is tiring.
examples.sw: Ukaidi wa mtoto huyu unachosha.

senses.definition_en: palm wine, liquor, beer, any alcoholic drink
senses.definition_dg: Kinywaji chenye kilevi, dza tembo, pombe au chanjinachosi ambacho chinakozesha.

examples.dg: Uchi munji unahasiri mwiri.
examples.en: Too much alcohol harms the body.
examples.sw: Pombe nyingi inadhuru mwili.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala na uhuphu, kukala bila mali au vitu.

examples.dg: Uchiya si aibu, lakini uvivu ndio aibu.
examples.en: Poverty is not a shame, but laziness is.
examples.sw: Umaskini si aibu, lakini uvivu ndio aibu.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kutsokoza mutu na kumuhenda akale na hasira.

examples.dg: Uchokozi wa mwana uyu ukamala, usihende hivyo.
examples.en: This child's teasing has been too much, don't do that.
examples.sw: Uchokozi wa mtoto huyu umezidi, usifanye hivyo.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kukala na roho ndide, kusironda kupha mutu au kushiriki na anjina.

examples.dg: Uchoyo si tabia nono; jifundze kupha.
examples.en: Selfishness is not a good character; learn to give.
examples.sw: Uchoyo si tabia nzuri; jifunze kutoa.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya daktari au ya kuphoza atu.

examples.dg: Udakitari ni kazi ya muhimu sana kpwa jamii.
examples.en: Medical work is a very important profession for the community.
examples.sw: Udaktari ni kazi muhimu sana kwa jamii.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chenye kunukia vizuri ambacho chinafukizwa kpwa moho.

examples.dg: Udi unanukia vinono nyumbani.
examples.en: The incense smells wonderful in the house.
examples.sw: Udi unanukia vizuri nyumbani.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia mbii ya kutamani na kuhenda mambo ga uzinifu.

examples.dg: Udiya ni dhambi kulu mbere za Mlungu.
examples.en: Lust is a great sin before God.
examples.sw: Uzinzi ni dhambi kubwa mbele za Mungu.

equivalents_en: make a loud blast or bang

senses.definition_en: to make a loud blast or bang, to explode loudly
senses.definition_dg: Kutoa sauti kulu ya kuphulika kpwa nguvu, dza ya bunduki au bomu.

examples.dg: Nkasikira mriro, ela simanya kukauduka utu wani
examples.en: I heard a sound, but I don't know what it was that exploded so loudly
examples.sw: Nilisikia mlipuko, lakini sijui ni kitu gani kililipuka.

senses.definition_dg: Cheo cha mfalume, au tsi ambayo inatawaliwa ni mfalume.

examples.dg: Ufalume wa Mlungu ni wa kare na kare.
examples.en: The kingdom of God is forever.
examples.sw: Ufalme wa Mungu ni wa milele.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi machafu ganagotoka kpwa kidonda ambacho hakikaphola.

examples.dg: Kidonda chinatoa ufira, ni lazima aphiye hospitali.
examples.en: The wound is discharging pus, he must go to the hospital.
examples.sw: Jeraha linatoa usaha, lazima aende hospitali.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala chitu chigumu na kisichopinda.

examples.dg: Muhogo ukiuma una ufu munji.
examples.en: When cassava dries it becomes very hard.
examples.sw: Muhogo ukikauka una ugumu mwingi.

senses.definition_dg: Ujuzi wa kutengeza vitu kpwa mikono au kpwa mashini.

examples.dg: Ana ufundi wa kutengeneza samani.
examples.en: He has the skill of making furniture.
examples.sw: Ana ufundi wa kutengeneza samani.

senses.definition_dg: Mali ambayo mutu anarisi bada ya mutu munjina kufwa.

examples.dg: Ufwa wa ise waganywa kahi ya ana osi.
examples.en: His father's inheritance was divided among all the children.
examples.sw: Urithi wa baba yake uligawanywa kati ya watoto wote.

sub_entries.definition_sw: to take care of a deceased person's family; kurithi; kulea familia ya aliyefufa

senses.definition_dg: Kuonera mutu kpwa kudzemera au kumuona si chitu.

examples.dg: Ufyozi ni tabia mbii; hishimu atu osi.
examples.en: Contempt is a bad character; respect all people.
examples.sw: Dharau ni tabia mbaya; heshimu watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Njia ya chizamani ya kuphoza atu kpwa mihi ya dawa na utaalamu wa kare.

examples.dg: Uganga wa chizamani uchere unatumiwa ni atu anji.
examples.en: Traditional healing is still used by many people.
examples.sw: Uganga wa jadi bado unatumika na watu wengi.

senses.definition_dg: Malumbano kahi ya atu airi au zaidi. Kutokukubaliana na kugombana.

examples.dg: Ugomvi wa majirani ni ubaya; bora kupatana.
examples.en: Quarrelling with neighbours is bad; it's better to reconcile.
examples.sw: Ugomvi wa majirani ni mbaya; bora kupatana.

senses.definition_en: to care for a sick person, to nurse someone
senses.definition_dg: Kutundza mutu ariye na ugonjwa, kumpha dawa na kumuangaliya.

examples.dg: Mwanawe anamuguza mamaye hospitali.
examples.en: Her child is nursing her mother at the hospital.
examples.sw: Mtoto wake anamguza mama yake hospitali.

examples.dg: Hangu kare jadi mutu nkuphiya windzani na uha na ryaka ra mivi
examples.en: An old custom is that a person goes hunting with a bow and a quiver of arrows

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na yakini kuhusu chitu, bila shaka yoyosi.

examples.dg: Nina uhakika kpwa mambo higa.
examples.en: I have certainty about these matters.
examples.sw: Nina uhakika kuhusu mambo haya.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phanapohereza, phatu pha hatari pha kutserera.

examples.dg: Phahali hipha kuchinya mvula phana uhereza sana
examples.en: In this place if there's a lot of rain it is very slippery
examples.sw: Mahali hapa wakati wa mvua pana utelezi sana.

senses.definition_en: vaginal fluids, jelly-like fluid that comes as female discharge
senses.definition_dg: Madzi ga mwiri ganagotoka kpwa mchetu kpwa sehemu za siri.

examples.dg: Proverb: Akuhombaye na mala, kombe zindaoga uhoko
examples.en: He who has sex using his fingers, his nails will wash in vaginal fluids
examples.sw: Akuazimaye vyungu, kombe zitaoga utoko — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu za ndani za mwiri ambazo zinapitisha chakurya bada ya kurywa. Kuna uhumbo mdide na uhumbo mkulu.

examples.dg: Ndani ya mwiri wa mutu kuna uhumbo mdide na uhumbo mkulu
examples.en: Inside a person's body there is the small intestine and the large intestine
examples.sw: Ndani ya mwili wa mtu kuna utumbo mdogo na utumbo mkubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala bila chochosi, uhuphu wa mali.

examples.dg: Uhuphu si ugonjwa; mutu anaweza kudzisaidia.
examples.en: Poverty is not a disease; a person can help themselves.
examples.sw: Umasikini si ugonjwa; mtu anaweza kujisaidia.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala bila kufungbwa na mutu au sheria za ubaya. Kudziamuliya mambo gako mwenye.

examples.dg: Uhuru wa tsi yehu wahendeka mwaka wa 1963.
examples.en: Our country's freedom happened in 1963.
examples.sw: Uhuru wa nchi yetu ulifanyika mwaka wa 1963.

senses.definition_dg: Namna ambayo atu anavyoishi na kusaidiana au kuhusiana.

examples.dg: Uhusiano wa majirani ni muhimu sana.
examples.en: The relationship between neighbours is very important.
examples.sw: Uhusiano wa majirani ni muhimu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Uchafu au unajisi, hali ya kukala chitu si safi.

examples.dg: Chimtiyacho mutu ui sicho chira aryacho
examples.en: It is not what a person eats that makes them unclean/defiled
examples.sw: Kinachomtia mtu uchafu si kile anachokula.

senses.definition_dg: Sifa ya kukala mbii au si safi.

examples.dg: Mahendo mui gandamriphiza ubaya.
examples.en: Evil deeds will bring bad consequences.
examples.sw: Matendo mabaya yataleta madhara.

senses.definition_en: a visit, a stay of several days, strangeness
senses.definition_dg: Kukala ujeni kpwa mutu ni kukala kpwa wakati fulani nyumbani kpwakpwe. Hali ya kukala mgeni.

examples.dg: Nkaphiya ujeni kpwa jirani siku tahu.
examples.en: I went on a visit to my neighbour for three days.
examples.sw: Nilikwenda ugeni kwa jirani siku tatu.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kugomba vibaya na kudharau atu, au kuhenda mambo ga nguvu.

examples.dg: Ujeuri wakpwe ndio unaomhendesa atu amriche.
examples.en: His rudeness is what makes people leave him.
examples.sw: Kiburi chake ndicho kinachomfanya watu wamwache.

senses.definition_dg: Kinywaji chinene chinahendwa kpwa unga na madzi, chinapikwa na kutiywa sukari.

examples.dg: Uji wa muhogo ni mtamu sana.
examples.en: Cassava porridge is very sweet.
examples.sw: Uji wa muhogo ni mtamu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala bila achili au kuhenda mambo ga kpwenda kure.

examples.dg: Ujinga wa mutu ndio unaomhasiri.
examples.en: A person's foolishness is what ruins them.
examples.sw: Ujinga wa mtu ndio unaomharibu.

equivalents_en: jelly-like fluid from a ripe mango
equivalents_sw: maji mororo kutoka kwa embe lililoiva sana

senses.definition_en: jelly-like fluid from a ripe mango
senses.definition_sw: maji mororo kutoka kwa embe lililoiva sana
senses.definition_dg: Madzi matamu-matamu ganagotoka kpwa embe ririroiva sana.

examples.dg: Embe hiri rina ujinji munji — rikaiva sana.
examples.en: This mango has a lot of jelly-like juice — it is very ripe.
examples.sw: Embe hili lina maji mengi — limeiva sana.

senses.definition_dg: Habari au maneno ambago ganapelekpwa kula kpwa mutu hadi kpwa mutu munjina.

examples.dg: Nkamuphirikira ujumbe wa baba.
examples.en: I delivered father's message to him.
examples.sw: Nilimpelekea ujumbe wa baba.

senses.definition_dg: Jumla ya vitu vyosi virivyohesabwa.

examples.dg: Ujumla wa atu osi akala mia mbiri.
examples.en: The total number of all people was two hundred.
examples.sw: Jumla ya watu wote walikuwa mia mbili.

senses.definition_dg: Kumanya mambo kpwa uzoefu au kpwa kujifundza.

examples.dg: Ana ujuzi wa kutengeneza nyumba.
examples.en: He has the knowledge of building houses.
examples.sw: Ana ujuzi wa kujenga nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsama phatu fulani na kuphiya phatu phanjina. Kuondoka.

examples.dg: Khamisi kapho, akauka kare
examples.en: Khamisi is not here, he has already left
examples.sw: Khamisi hayupo, ameondoka tayari.

senses.definition_dg: Mchetu ambaye anaguza mwiri kpwa hela. Malaya.

examples.dg: (See: mashoga) Ukachererwadze?
examples.en: How have you woken up?
examples.sw: Kazi ya ukahaba si kazi ya heshima.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kusironda kuhenda kazi. Uvivu.

examples.dg: Ukaha ni adui ya maendeleo.
examples.en: Laziness is the enemy of progress.
examples.sw: Uvivu ni adui wa maendeleo.

senses.definition_en: gum used to catch birds, made from boiling the resin of certain trees
senses.definition_dg: Gundi ya kunasa nyama wa mapha ambayo inahendwa kpwa kutokosa ganda ra mihi fulani.

examples.dg: Atiya ukaka muhini kunasa nyuni.
examples.en: He put birdlime on the tree to catch birds.
examples.sw: Aliweka gundi mtini kunasa ndege.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kuwindza nyama.

examples.dg: Kare atu akala akihenda ukala tsakani.
examples.en: In the past people used to go hunting in the bush.
examples.sw: Zamani watu walikuwa wakifanya uwindaji porini.

equivalents_en: How have you woken up? Usual morning greeting
equivalents_sw: Umeamkaje? Salamu ya asabuhi ya kawaida

senses.definition_en: How have you woken up? Usual morning greeting
senses.definition_sw: Umeamkaje? Salamu ya asabuhi ya kawaida
senses.definition_dg: Salamu ya ligundzu ya Chidigo inayouza mutu akalamuhadze.

examples.dg: Ukalamukadze? — Nkalamuka vinono.
examples.en: How have you woken up? — I have woken up well.
examples.sw: Umeamkaje? — Nimeamka vizuri.

equivalents_en: How have you slept? morning greeting

senses.definition_en: How have you slept? morning greeting
senses.definition_dg: Salamu ya ligundzu inayouza mutu akalazadze usiku.

examples.dg: Ukalazadze? — Nkalala vinono.
examples.en: How did you sleep? — I slept well.
examples.sw: Umelalaje? — Nimelala vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa kuambukiza ambao unakera zaidi anache adide, unaovyosa vidonda mwirini.

examples.dg: Ukambi ni ukongo ambao unaweza kuolaga anache adide
examples.en: Measles is an illness which can kill young children
examples.sw: Ukambi ni ugonjwa unaoweza kuua watoto wadogo.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala chitu chikamala, bila kupungukiwa chochosi.

examples.dg: Ukamilifu wa kazi iyo ni mzuri.
examples.en: The completeness of that work is good.
examples.sw: Ukamilifu wa kazi hiyo ni mzuri.

senses.definition_en: clerical work, the work of a secretary or clerk
senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kuandika, kuhesabu, na kutengeza barua ofisini.

examples.dg: Ana kazi ya ukarani ofisini.
examples.en: He has clerical work at the office.
examples.sw: Ana kazi ya ukarani ofisini.

equivalents_en: How have you spent the day? evening greeting

senses.definition_en: How have you spent the day? evening greeting
senses.definition_dg: Salamu ya dziloni ya Chidigo inayouza mutu akasindadze muhana.

examples.dg: Ukasindadze? — Nkasinda vinono.
examples.en: How have you spent the day? — I have spent it well.
examples.sw: Umeshindaje? — Nimeshinda vizuri.

equivalents_sw: remains of maize meal or rice in a cooking pot; ukoko

senses.definition_sw: remains of maize meal or rice in a cooking pot; ukoko

examples.dg: Proverb: Cha kuhewa tachina ukoko
examples.en: If you are given food you won't get the left-overs as well

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya mutu kukala achafu, asiyeodzea au kudzisafisha.

examples.dg: Ukolo si chitu chinono; dzisafishe.
examples.en: Dirtiness is not a good thing; clean yourself.
examples.sw: Uchafu si kitu kizuri; jisafishe.

senses.definition_dg: Kukombolwa, kutiywa huru kula kpwa utumwa au dhambi.

examples.dg: Ukombozi wa Mlungu ni mkpwulu.
examples.en: God's redemption is great.
examples.sw: Ukombozi wa Mungu ni mkuu.

senses.definition_en: disease, disability, covers physical and mental, even the results
senses.definition_dg: Hali yoyosi ya mwiri au achili ambayo si ya kawaida. Ugonjwa wa aina yoyosi.

examples.dg: Ukongo uhu ukala kure sana.
examples.en: This disease has lasted a very long time.
examples.sw: Ugonjwa huu umedumu muda mrefu sana.

senses.definition_en: ancestry, clan. Each ukoo has its own name, and it is vital for an individual to know to which ukoo he belongs. An oath unites all members of the ukoo, and obliges the members to help each other in
senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra atu ambao ni wa milatso mwenga. Chila ukoo una dzina rakpwe, na ni muhimu mutu ammanye ukoo wakpwe.

examples.dg: Ukoo wehu una dzina ra Mwakikunga.
examples.en: Our clan has the name Mwakikunga.
examples.sw: Ukoo wetu una jina la Mwakikunga.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya unafiki.

examples.dg: Ukpware ni neno ranjina ra unafiki.
examples.en: Ukpware is another word for hypocrisy.
examples.sw: Ukpware ni neno lingine la unafiki.

senses.definition_en: greatness of size: big, bulky huge
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala chitu ni kikulu kpwa upana au urefu.

examples.dg: Ukulu wa muhi uhu unashangaza.
examples.en: The size of this tree is amazing.
examples.sw: Ukubwa wa mti huu unashangaza.

senses.definition_en: moral greatness: high, powerful, important, weighty
senses.definition_dg: Ukulu wa hali ya dzulu, kukala na nguvu au thamani kulu.

examples.dg: Ukulu wa Mlungu ni wa kare na kare.
examples.en: God's greatness is forever.
examples.sw: Ukubwa wa Mungu ni wa milele.

senses.definition_dg: Chumba kikulu au phatu phapana pha kukutanira atu.

examples.dg: Mkutano ukakala kpwa ukumbi mkulu.
examples.en: The meeting was held in the large hall.
examples.sw: Mkutano ulifanyika katika ukumbi mkubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kumanya njia za kutsupira na kutengeza vitu kpwa ujanja.

examples.dg: Mutu wa ulachu anaishi vinono.
examples.en: A clever person lives well.
examples.sw: Mtu wa ujanja anaishi vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Bara ambaro ri kure na Afrika, ra atu enye ngozi nyere.

examples.dg: Mwanawe waphiya Ulaya kusoma.
examples.en: His child went to Europe to study.
examples.sw: Mtoto wake alikwenda Ulaya kusoma.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala ukakozesha kpwa sababu ya kunwa uchi munji.

examples.dg: Ulevi ni tabia mbii inayohasiri afya.
examples.en: Drunkenness is a bad habit that ruins health.
examples.sw: Ulevi ni tabia mbaya inayoharibu afya.

equivalents_en: resin from certain trees which is boiled in order to make gum for

senses.definition_en: resin from certain trees which is boiled in order to make gum for
senses.definition_dg: Gundi inayohendwa kpwa kutokosa ganda ra mihi fulani. Inatumiwa kunasa nyuni.

examples.dg: Ulimbo unatiywa muhini kunasa nyuni.
examples.en: Birdlime is put on a tree to catch birds.
examples.sw: Gundi ya ndege huwekwa mtini kunasa ndege.

examples.dg: Proverb: Gasigomanya ulimbo gagbwirwa mairi mairi
examples.en: Those who don't know what glue is get caught two by two

senses.definition_dg: Udongo unaouma na kukala mwororo, unatumiwa kutengeza nyungu na vitu vinjina.

examples.dg: Ano mayo nkuumba nyungu na ulongo
examples.en: The women make pots from clay
examples.sw: Hawa mama huumba vyungu kwa udongo.

senses.definition_dg: Mazungumzo ya kupatana kpwa arusi kahi ya mbari mbiri.

examples.dg: Ulozi wa mwana wehu ukakala vinono.
examples.en: Our child's marriage negotiation went well.
examples.sw: Mazungumzo ya arusi ya mtoto wetu yalikwenda vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi au unyevu kutoka na phatu kukala pakavu.

examples.dg: Muho wauma kpwa sababu ya dzuwa kali.
examples.en: The river dried up because of the hot sun.
examples.sw: Mto ulikauka kwa sababu ya jua kali.

senses.definition_dg: Kutengeza chitu, kuumba.

examples.dg: Mlungu waumba dunia na vitu vyosi.
examples.en: God created the world and everything in it.
examples.sw: Mungu aliumba dunia na vitu vyote.

senses.definition_dg: Habari za handzo au za atu zisizo za kpweli zinazoenezerwa.

examples.dg: Umbeya ni tabia mbii; usieneze habari za atu.
examples.en: Gossip is a bad habit; don't spread people's stories.
examples.sw: Umbeya ni tabia mbaya; usieneze habari za watu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mwiri mzuri wa kupangika vinono.

examples.dg: Mwanache iye ana umbika ya kupendeza.
examples.en: That young person has a well-proportioned figure.
examples.sw: Kijana yule ana umbo zuri.

senses.definition_dg: Namna ambavyo chitu chinaonekana, sura ya mutu au chitu.

examples.dg: Umbo ra mutu iye ni razuri.
examples.en: That person's physical appearance is good.
examples.sw: Umbo la mtu yule ni zuri.

senses.definition_dg: Muanga wa nguvu unaphenya kula mainguni wakati wa mvula na radi.

examples.dg: Umeme waphenya na kuphiga muhi.
examples.en: Lightning struck and hit a tree.
examples.sw: Umeme ulipiga mti.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya ndani ya koo ambayo chakurya chinapitira kpwendza tumboni.

examples.dg: Ana vironda vya umiro
examples.en: She has sore throat
examples.sw: Ana vidonda vya koo, hasemi vizuri.

equivalents_en: do something that is very difficult and maybe abnormal

senses.definition_en: to do something that is very difficult and maybe abnormal, e.g. to
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chigumu sana ambacho si cha kawaida kuhendwa.

examples.dg: Waumirya kuhenda kazi hiyo mwenye-mwenye.
examples.en: He struggled to do that work all by himself.
examples.sw: Alijitahidi kufanya kazi hiyo peke yake.

sub_entries.definition_en: mother because she left her child naked
sub_entries.definition_sw: kufanya kitu kisicho cha kawaida, k.m

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chikale chakavu kpwa kuusa unyevu.

examples.dg: Dzuwa rinaumisa nyasi
examples.en: The sun is drying up the grass
examples.sw: Jua linakausha nyasi.

equivalents_en: rise as a result of yeast or fermentation

senses.definition_en: to rise as a result of yeast or fermentation
senses.definition_dg: Kuunuka na kukala kukulu kpwa sababu ya hamira au utulivu wa kutokosa.

examples.dg: Unga waumuka vinono, mkpwahe u tayari kuochwa.
examples.en: The dough has risen well, the bread is ready to be baked.
examples.sw: Unga umefura vizuri, mkate uko tayari kuokwa.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala atu akala kitu chimwenga, kuungana.

examples.dg: Umwenga ni nguvu; kuganya ni unyofu.
examples.en: Unity is strength; division is weakness.
examples.sw: Umoja ni nguvu; utengano ni udhaifu.

equivalents_sw: una; namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu

senses.definition_sw: una; namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki ambaye anariywa ni atu.

examples.dg: Una ni samaki mtamu sana.
examples.en: Una is a very tasty fish.
examples.sw: Una ni samaki mtamu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ganagogombwa kpwa uwezo wa Mlungu kuhusu mambo gandagohendeka badaye.

examples.dg: Unabii wa nabii ukakala kpweli.
examples.en: The prophet's prophecy came true.
examples.sw: Unabii wa nabii ulikuwa kweli.

senses.definition_en: hypocrisy, changing to please whoever with at the moment
senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kubadilika ili upendeze mutu yoyosi ariye mbere yako, na kukosa ukpweli.

examples.dg: Unafiki ni tabia mbii; kala wa kpweli kpwa atu osi.
examples.en: Hypocrisy is a bad character; be truthful to everyone.
examples.sw: Unafiki ni tabia mbaya; kuwa mkweli kwa watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Kutengeza chitu chiphya, kuunda.

examples.dg: Fundi waunda samani nono sana.
examples.en: The craftsman made very beautiful furniture.
examples.sw: Fundi aliunda samani nzuri sana.

senses.definition_en: to make, to create, to construct
senses.definition_dg: Kutengeza chitu chiphya, kuunda.

examples.dg: Fundi waunda samani nono sana.
examples.en: The craftsman made very beautiful furniture.
examples.sw: Fundi aliunda samani nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Yai (neno ra kare risirotumiwa sana sambi hivi).

examples.dg: Undu ni neno ra kare ra yai.
examples.en: Undu is an old word for egg.
examples.sw: Undu ni neno la zamani la yai.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mulume ambaye kakaoa, kukala kapera.

examples.dg: Undzaka wa mutu iye ni wa muda mure.
examples.en: That person's bachelorhood has lasted a long time.
examples.sw: Uhuni wa mtu yule ni wa muda mrefu.

senses.definition_dg: Chakurya chirichosagwa hadi chikakala dza pudha. Unga wa muhogo, wa ngano, na wanjina.

examples.dg: Gurira unga wa muhogo dukani.
examples.en: Buy cassava flour at the shop.
examples.sw: Nunua unga wa muhogo dukani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuungana na mutu munjina, kuika phamwenga.

examples.dg: Waungana na anjina kutengeneza baraza.
examples.en: He joined with others to form a council.
examples.sw: Aliungana na wengine kutengeneza baraza.

equivalents_en: come together to form a group

senses.definition_en: to come together to form a group, to join with one another
senses.definition_dg: Atu kutsama-tsama na kukutana phatu phwenga, kukala kundi.

examples.dg: Atu aungana msikitini kpwa ibada.
examples.en: People gathered at the mosque for worship.
examples.sw: Watu walikusanyika msikitini kwa ibada.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika vitu au atu phamwenga, kuunganya.

examples.dg: Mwalimu waunganisha anafundzi darasani.
examples.en: The teacher gathered the students in the classroom.
examples.sw: Mwalimu aliunganisha wanafunzi darasani.

senses.definition_en: a joint of the body, the body as a whole, and in particular the back
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mwiri ambayo inaunganya mifupha, hasa chiuno au mgongo.

examples.dg: Alalamika ungo wa mgongo unamuuma.
examples.en: He complains that his back joint is hurting.
examples.sw: Analalamika mgongo unamuma.

sub_entries.definition_en: of a tree bearing fresh fruit

senses.definition_dg: Kufika umri wa kuola, kubalihi.

examples.dg: Mwanache iye akavundza ungo — akabalihi.
examples.en: That young person has reached puberty.
examples.sw: Kijana yule amebalehe.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala vinono, uzuri.

examples.dg: Unono wa kazi yako unaonekana.
examples.en: The goodness of your work is visible.
examples.sw: Uzuri wa kazi yako unaonekana.

senses.definition_en: to rise, get up, stand up
senses.definition_dg: Kulamuka na kuima kula phatu pha kukala au kulala.

examples.dg: Unuka kula phahali hipho, mutu mkulu analonda kukala.
examples.en: Get up from that place, an elder wants to sit.
examples.sw: Enuka mahali hapo, mzee anataka kukaa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu dzulu au kukitsukula kula tsini kuphiya dzulu.

examples.dg: Unula mfuko uhu uuike dzulu ya meza.
examples.en: Lift this bag and put it on the table.
examples.sw: Inua mfuko huu uuweke juu ya meza.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya mwiri kukala bila nguvu, kulegea.

examples.dg: Ana unyonje mwirini bada ya ugonjwa.
examples.en: He has weakness in the body after the illness.
examples.sw: Ana ulegevu wa mwili baada ya ugonjwa.

examples.dg: Upepo unapiga
examples.en: The wind is blowing

senses.definition_en: talking too much, saying something even if one does not know
senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kugomba-gomba mambo manji hata usiyogamanya.

examples.dg: Mutu wa upereto kagombwa ni atu anji.
examples.en: A person who talks too much is not welcomed by many people.
examples.sw: Mtu wa maneno mengi hapendwi na watu wengi.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa haraka, bila kukawia.

examples.dg: Phiya upesi, usikawiye.
examples.en: Go quickly, don't delay.
examples.sw: Nenda upesi, usikawie.

senses.definition_en: side, direction, piece, portion, direction, a certain part, region, district, part of a town or country
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu mwenga ya chitu au ya phatu. Njira ambayo chitu chinaangaliya.

examples.dg: Mayo akagaluza chapati uphande wanjina
examples.en: Mother turned the pancake to the other side
examples.sw: Mama aligeuza chapati upande mwingine.

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa ngozi unaoluma na kutoa vidonda vidide mwirini.

examples.dg: Ana uphere mwirini; aphiye hospitali.
examples.en: He has scabies on his body; he should go to the hospital.
examples.sw: Ana upele mwilini; aende hospitali.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mutu mzee, umri wa kuzee.

examples.dg: Uphevu si ugonjwa, ni baraka ya Mlungu.
examples.en: Old age is not a disease, it is God's blessing.
examples.sw: Uzee si ugonjwa, ni baraka ya Mungu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala bila thamani au faidha. Utupu.

examples.dg: Maneno ga uphupu tagana faidha.
examples.en: Empty words have no benefit.
examples.sw: Maneno ya utupu hayana faida.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala chitu chiphya, ambacho hakikakala buda.

examples.dg: Uphya wa nyumba ihi unapendeza.
examples.en: The newness of this house is pleasing.
examples.sw: Upya wa nyumba hii unapendeza.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kushindana na mutu munjina. Kupinga.

examples.dg: Upindzani wa siasa ni wa kawaida.
examples.en: Political rivalry is normal.
examples.sw: Upinzani wa siasa ni wa kawaida.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kugomba na kuhenda mambo kpwa utulivu bila hasira.

examples.dg: Mutu wa upole anapendwa ni atu osi.
examples.en: A gentle person is loved by everyone.
examples.sw: Mtu wa upole anapendwa na watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno au mahendo gasigo na maana au faidha.

examples.dg: Usigombe upuzi, gomba maneno ga maana.
examples.en: Don't talk nonsense, say meaningful words.
examples.sw: Usiseme upuzi, sema maneno yenye maana.

senses.definition_dg: Upimo wa chitu kula phatu phwenga hadi phanjina — kunyooha au kukula kpwa dzulu.

examples.dg: Ure wa muhi uhu ni mkulu sana.
examples.en: The height of this tree is very great.
examples.sw: Urefu wa mti huu ni mkubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mapambo au vitu vya kupendeza.

examples.dg: Urembo wa nyumba unapendeza.
examples.en: The decoration of the house is pleasing.
examples.sw: Urembo wa nyumba unapendeza.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya utajiri.

examples.dg: Urezi ni neno ranjina ra utajiri.
examples.en: Urezi is another word for riches.
examples.sw: Urezi ni neno lingine la utajiri.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kurera na kutundza mwana.

examples.dg: Urezi wa anache ni kazi ya azazi osi airi.
examples.en: Child rearing is the work of both parents.
examples.sw: Ulezi wa watoto ni kazi ya wazazi wote wawili.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kurinda na kutundza ili kusihasiriwe.

examples.dg: Urindzi wa tsi yehu ni muhimu.
examples.en: The protection of our country is important.
examples.sw: Ulinzi wa nchi yetu ni muhimu.

equivalents_en: a raised platform in a farm used by a watchman guarding

senses.definition_en: a raised platform in a farm used by a watchman guarding
senses.definition_dg: Chitala cha dzulu kpwenye munda ambacho mutu anapanda kpwenye kurinda mimea kula kpwa nyama.

examples.dg: Mzee anakala dzulu ya uringo kurinda munda usiku.
examples.en: The elder sits on the raised platform to guard the farm at night.
examples.sw: Mzee anakaa juu ya jukwaa kulinda shamba usiku.

senses.definition_dg: Mali ambayo inarisiwa bada ya mutu kufwa.

examples.dg: Urisi wa baba uganywe sawa-sawa.
examples.en: Father's inheritance should be divided equally.
examples.sw: Urithi wa baba ugawanywe sawa sawa.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kuronda chitu chinji kuliko unachohitaji. Uchoyo wa chakurya au mali.

examples.dg: Uroho si tabia nono; ridhika na urichonacho.
examples.en: Greediness is not a good character; be content with what you have.
examples.sw: Uchoyo si tabia nzuri; ridhika na ulicho nacho.

senses.definition_dg: Kuima phatu na kupaa dzulu kpwa nguvu, au nyama wa mapha kuphiya angani.

examples.dg: Mwana waruka dzulu ya ukuta.
examples.en: The child jumped over the wall.
examples.sw: Mtoto aliruka juu ya ukuta.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsupha chitu kpwa nguvu ili chiphiye kure.

examples.dg: Warusa dziwe na kuphiga dirisha.
examples.en: He threw a stone and hit the window.
examples.sw: Alirusha jiwe na kupiga dirisha.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoa chitu kula phatu phakpwe au kumutsosa mutu phatu.

examples.dg: Nkausa chitabu kula phahaliphe
examples.en: I removed the book from its place
examples.sw: Niliondoa kitabu kutoka mahali pake.

equivalents_en: celebrate or carry out a ceremony

senses.definition_en: to celebrate or carry out a ceremony
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda sherehe au heshima ya chizamani.

examples.dg: Mwishowe achiusa hanga
examples.en: In the end they held a funeral
examples.sw: Hatimaye alifanya sherehe.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi machafu ganagotoka kpwa kidonda.

examples.dg: Kidonda chinatoa usaha munji.
examples.en: The wound is discharging a lot of pus.
examples.sw: Jeraha linatoa usaha mengi.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala sawa-sawa, bila kubaguliwa.

examples.dg: Usawa wa atu osi ni muhimu.
examples.en: Equality of all people is important.
examples.sw: Usawa wa watu wote ni muhimu.

senses.definition_dg: Mkufu wa ushanga unaovwalwa shingoni.

examples.dg: Mchetu wavwala useja wa ushanga.
examples.en: The woman wore a necklace of beads.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alivaa mkufu wa shanga.

senses.definition_dg: Uhusiano mnono wa majirani au atu ambao anadzihendekera mambo manono.

examples.dg: Usena wa kpweli ni wa thamani sana.
examples.en: True friendship is very valuable.
examples.sw: Urafiki wa kweli ni wa thamani sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeona au kugomba kuhusu jambo, au ushahidi ni mambo ganagomanyikana ga kpweli.

examples.dg: Ana ushahidi wa mambo gagohendeka.
examples.en: He has testimony of what happened.
examples.sw: Ana ushahidi wa mambo yaliyotokea.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga busara ambago mutu anaambirwa ili amterye kuhenda uamuzi.

examples.dg: Ushauri wa mzee ni muhimu; usikire.
examples.en: The elder's advice is important; listen to it.
examples.sw: Ushauri wa mzee ni muhimu; usikilize.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kushinda kpwa mchezo, viha, au jambo ranjina.

examples.dg: Ushindi wehu ukahendesa atu furaha.
examples.en: Our victory made people happy.
examples.sw: Ushindi wetu uliwafurahisha watu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuteryana na kuhenda kazi phamwenga kpwa lengo mwenga.

examples.dg: Ushirika wa majirani unaendelea vinono.
examples.en: Cooperation among neighbours is going well.
examples.sw: Ushirika wa majirani unaendelea vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya usubwi.

examples.dg: Ushubwi ni neno ranjina ra usubwi.
examples.en: Ushubwi is another word for usubwi (gnat).
examples.sw: Ushubwi ni neno lingine la usubwi.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga kpweli kuhusu chitu ambacho mutu achikiona au achikisikira.

examples.dg: Ushuhuda wakpwe ukakubaliwa ni atu osi.
examples.en: His testimony was accepted by everyone.
examples.sw: Ushuhuda wake ulikubaliwa na watu wote.

sub_entries.definition_sw: usingizi wa palawaga deep sleep; fofofo

senses.definition_dg: Hasira kali, hali ya kukala mutu wa kutisha.

examples.dg: Usiru wa mutu iye unaogofya atu.
examples.en: That person's fierceness frightens people.
examples.sw: Hasira za mtu yule zinawaogopesha watu.

senses.definition_en: to order or direct, especially final instructions given before the
senses.definition_dg: Kuambira mutu mambo ga muhimu kabla ya kufwa au kutsama kpwa muda mure. Wosia.

examples.dg: Baba wausiya anae kabla ya kufwa.
examples.en: The father gave his final instructions to his children before dying.
examples.sw: Baba aliwaosia watoto wake kabla ya kufa.

senses.definition_en: gnat, small insect like a mosquito found in swampy areas
senses.definition_dg: Mududu mdide dza mbu ambaye anakala kpwa phatu pha madzi manji na matope.

examples.dg: Usubwi ni mududu wa kusumbua sana usiku.
examples.en: The gnat is a very bothersome insect at night.
examples.sw: Mdudu mdogo kama mbu anasumbua sana usiku.

senses.definition_en: taciturnity, habit of not wanting to talk to anyone
senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kukala mutu asiyelonda kugomba na atu, kukala wa kimya muda wosi.

examples.dg: Usununu wa mutu iye unashangaza; kagomba na mutu yoyosi.
examples.en: That person's taciturnity is surprising; he doesn't talk to anyone.
examples.sw: Ukimya wa mtu yule unashangaza; hasemi na mtu yeyote.

equivalents_en: kupigbwa to have one's head covered in mourning

senses.definition_en: , kupigbwa to have one's head covered in mourning
senses.definition_dg: Kufunika chitswa cha mutu ariye kpwa matanga kpwa kuonyesa huzuni.

examples.dg: Mchetu wavwalishwa utaji wakati wa matanga.
examples.en: The woman had her head covered during the mourning period.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alifunikwa kichwa wakati wa matanga.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala na mali nyinji, utajiri.

examples.dg: Msidziikire utajiri hipha duniani, ambapho adudu na ng'andu ni kuubananga
examples.en: Do not store up for riches for yourselves here on earth, where insects and rust will destroy it
examples.sw: Msijiwekee utajiri hapa duniani, ambapo wadudu na kutu wanaharibu.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya uyirana.

examples.dg: Utambi ni neno ranjina ra uyirana.
examples.en: Utambi is another word for uyirana.
examples.sw: Utambi ni neno lingine la uyirana.

equivalents_en: wick of a candle or lamp

senses.definition_en: wick of a candle or lamp
senses.definition_dg: Uzi ambao unaaka kpwa taa au mshumaa.

examples.dg: Utambi wa taa ukafuphika; itsukule kuukata.
examples.en: The wick of the lamp has become short; take scissors to cut it.
examples.sw: Utambi wa taa umefupika; chukua mkasi uukate.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kuongoza tsi au kundi ra atu kpwa mamlaka.

examples.dg: Utawala wa haki ni muhimu kpwa tsi.
examples.en: Just governance is important for a country.
examples.sw: Utawala wa haki ni muhimu kwa nchi.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya laini ya dzulu ya chitswa cha mwana mdide mchanga.

examples.dg: Utosi wa mwana mchanga ni sehemu ya laini.
examples.en: The fontanel of a newborn baby is a soft spot.
examples.sw: Utosi wa mtoto mchanga ni sehemu laini.

senses.definition_dg: Uchawi, mambo ga giza ambago ganahenda kpwa kuhasiri atu.

examples.dg: Utsai ni chitu kibaya ambacho Mlungu anachirema.
examples.en: Witchcraft is a bad thing that God rejects.
examples.sw: Uchawi ni kitu kibaya ambacho Mungu anakataa.

senses.definition_dg: Wakati wa kukala mwana mdide, utoto.

examples.dg: Utsanga wa mwana ni wakati wa kucheza na kujifundza.
examples.en: Infancy is a time for playing and learning.
examples.sw: Utoto ni wakati wa kucheza na kujifunza.

senses.definition_en: community, people who live in the same village
senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra atu anaoishi phatu phwenga na kuteryanya, jamii.

examples.dg: Proverb: Uchizirwa ni utsi mavigo ni ga lifyoka
examples.en: If you are hated by the community your shit is diarrhoea
examples.sw: Ukichukiwa na jamii, matatizo ni ya upweke — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Mambo ga mali ya tsi, namna atu anavyophaha na kutumiya hela.

examples.dg: Utsumi wa tsi yehu unaendelea kukula.
examples.en: Our country's economy continues to grow.
examples.sw: Uchumi wa nchi yetu unaendelea kukua.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala na huzuni kulu moyoni, utsungu wa ndani.

examples.dg: Ana utsungu wa kupoteza mwanawe.
examples.en: She has the grief of losing her child.
examples.sw: Ana uchungu wa kupoteza mtoto wake.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu au sababu ya mambo. Piya ni hali ya kukala mutu wa haki.

examples.dg: Hiye kana utu
examples.en: That person is not considerate (he won't help you or listen to your problems)
examples.sw: Yeye ana utu — mtu wa haki na heshima.

examples.dg: Kpwa utu wani mkamricha kuko?
examples.en: Now where is that person?

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kukala mtume au kupelekpwa na Mlungu kuhubiri.

examples.dg: Utume wa Paulo ukakala mkulu.
examples.en: Paul's apostleship was great.
examples.sw: Utume wa Paulo ulikuwa mkuu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mzee, umri wa kuzee.

examples.dg: Utumiya ni baraka ya Mlungu.
examples.en: Old age is a blessing from God.
examples.sw: Uzee ni baraka ya Mungu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mutumwa, kukala unafunga kazi bila hiari.

examples.dg: Utumwa ni chitu kibaya ambacho chikamala kare.
examples.en: Slavery is a bad thing that ended long ago.
examples.sw: Utumwa ni kitu kibaya kilichoisha zamani.

senses.definition_dg: Tendo ra kushambuliya tsi au phatu kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Uvamizi wa maadui ukahendesa atu ahambire.
examples.en: The enemy invasion made people flee.
examples.sw: Uvamizi wa maadui uliwafanya watu wakimbie.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kusironda kuhenda kazi.

examples.dg: Uvivu ndio adui mkulu wa maendeleo.
examples.en: Laziness is the biggest enemy of progress.
examples.sw: Uvivu ndio adui mkubwa wa maendeleo.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chenye kunukia vizuri ambacho chinafukizwa.

examples.dg: Uvumba unanukia vizuri msikitini.
examples.en: The incense smells good in the mosque.
examples.sw: Uvumba unanukia vizuri msikitini.

senses.definition_en: loneliness, state of being lonely and sad
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala phakpwe mwenye bila atu anjina na kukala na huzuni.

examples.dg: Uvumvu unamuremesa mzee iye; mteree.
examples.en: Loneliness is burdening that elder; help him.
examples.sw: Upweke unamlemea mzee yule; msaidie.

senses.definition_dg: Vizazi vyosi vya mutu — anae, ajukulue, na anjina anaomlandira.

examples.dg: Uvyazi wa Ibrahimu ni munji sana.
examples.en: Abraham's descendants are very many.
examples.sw: Kizazi cha Ibrahimu ni kingi sana.

equivalents_sw: uhusiano wa wazazi ambao watoto waowalioana

senses.definition_sw: uhusiano wa wazazi ambao watoto waowalioana
senses.definition_dg: Uhusiano wa azazi ambao anao ameoane. Piya ni hali ya ukulu wa umri.

examples.dg: Uvyere ni uhusiano wa hishima kahi ya mbari mbiri.
examples.en: The in-law relationship is a relationship of respect between two families.
examples.sw: Uhusiano wa wakwe ni uhusiano wa heshima kati ya familia mbili.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala mzee, kukala na umri mkulu.

examples.dg: Uvyere wakpwe unaonekana.
examples.en: His old age is visible.
examples.sw: Uzee wake unaonekana.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phadide pha kuogera au kuphiya msalani phatu ambapo phauzunguluswe na kuta.

examples.dg: Nkendza kuoga uwani.
examples.en: I want to bathe in the washroom.
examples.sw: Nataka kuoga uani.

senses.definition_en: you singular (used alone, often for emphasis)
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukuhisha mutu mmwenga unayegomba naye. Wewe.

examples.dg: Phoripho u mzima, uwe phamwenga na mayo na anao
examples.en: I trust you are well, you together with your wife and children
examples.sw: Wakati uko hai, wewe pamoja na mama na watoto wako.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala phakpwe mwenye bila mutu wa kuteryana naye.

examples.dg: Uweche unarehera mutu huzuni.
examples.en: Loneliness brings a person sadness.
examples.sw: Upweke unamletea mtu huzuni.

senses.definition_dg: Nguvu au haki ya kuhenda chitu. Kukala na uwezo wa kuhenda mambo.

examples.dg: Mlungu ana uwezo wa kuhenda chochosi.
examples.en: God has the power to do anything.
examples.sw: Mungu ana uwezo wa kufanya chochote.

senses.definition_dg: Kuuya nyuma au kuphiya phatu ambapho ukala buda.

examples.dg: Baba wauya kula kazini dziloni.
examples.en: Father returned from work in the evening.
examples.sw: Baba alirudi kutoka kazini jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu mara ya phiri, kurudiya.

examples.dg: Uyira maneno higo tsona ili nisikire vinono.
examples.en: Repeat those words again so I can hear well.
examples.sw: Rudia maneno hayo tena ili nisikiwe vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu kupunguka kpwa upana au urefu, hasa nguwo ikiofuliwa.

examples.dg: Takuna ariyeshona chiraka chiphya demu ra kare, mana hicho chiraka chichiandza kuuyirana, hira demu rindazidi kukpwanyuka
examples.en: No-one stitches a new patch on an old garment, for that patch when it starts to shrink, that garment will continue to tear
examples.sw: Hakuna atakayeshona kiraka kipya kwenye nguo ya zamani, kwa sababu kiraka kitaanza kupunguka.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya vikura.

examples.dg: Uyiza ni neno ranjina ra vikura.
examples.en: Uyiza is another word for vikura (fortune).
examples.sw: Uyiza ni neno lingine la vikura (bahati).

senses.definition_dg: Kurudisha chitu kpwa mwenyewe au phatu phakpwe.

examples.dg: Wauyiza chitabu
examples.en: He returned the book
examples.sw: Alirudisha kitabu.

senses.definition_en: mseho to sigh, to breathe out heavily
senses.definition_dg: Kupumua kpwa nguvu kpwa sababu ya huzuni au uchovu.

examples.dg: Wauyiza mseho mkulu bada ya kusikira habari mbii.
examples.en: He sighed deeply after hearing bad news.
examples.sw: Alitoa pumzi nzito baada ya kusikia habari mbaya.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra muhi wa mbuyu, ambaro rina ladha ya mashariki na rinatumiwa kpwa kinywaji.

examples.dg: Uyu unahendwa kinywaji kitamu.
examples.en: Baobab fruit is made into a tasty drink.
examples.sw: Tunda la mbuyu hutengenezwa kinywaji kitamu.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuuliza mutu swali ili umanyiswe chitu.

examples.dg: Uza mwalimu ukasimanya.
examples.en: Ask the teacher if you don't know.
examples.sw: Uliza mwalimu usipojua.

senses.definition_en: adultery, fornication (used of a long term relationship between two people such as a man
senses.definition_dg: Uhusiano wa uzinifu wa muda mure kahi ya atu ambao si mkpwaza na mkpwaziye.

examples.dg: Uzembe ni dhambi kulu kpwa dini.
examples.en: Adultery is a great sin in religion.
examples.sw: Uzinzi ni dhambi kubwa katika dini.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chire na chembamba cha kushonera au kufumira.

examples.dg: Mshonadzi anaphirika uzi hiku na hiku
examples.en: The tailor is weaving the thread (lit
examples.sw: Mshonaji anapitisha uzi huku na huku.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kuhenda uzinifu, kulala na mutu ambaye si mkpwaziye au mkpwazako.

examples.dg: Uzindzi ni dhambi mbii sana.
examples.en: Adultery is a very bad sin.
examples.sw: Uzinzi ni dhambi mbaya sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mambo gosi ga kuzini, hasa kulala na mutu ambaye si mkpwaziye au mkpwazako.

examples.dg: Uzinifu unahasiri mbari nyinji.
examples.en: Sexual immorality destroys many families.
examples.sw: Uasherati unaharibu familia nyingi.

senses.definition_dg: Mtego wa samaki unaohendwa kpwa fito. Piya ni fito za kuimisha ukuta wa nyumba.

examples.dg: Wavwika uzio muhoni kunasa samaki.
examples.en: He set a fishing trap in the river to catch fish.
examples.sw: Aliweka mtego wa samaki mtoni kunasa samaki.

senses.definition_dg: Fito za kuimisha ukuta wa nyumba.

examples.dg: Uzio wa nyumba ukaimishwa vinono.
examples.en: The upright poles of the house were set up well.
examples.sw: Nguzo za nyumba zilisimamishwa vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala vinono, kupendeza.

examples.dg: Uzuri wa phatu hipha unapendeza.
examples.en: The beauty of this place is pleasing.
examples.sw: Uzuri wa mahali hapa unapendeza.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala bila achili, ujinga.

examples.dg: Uzuzu ni adui; dzisomeshe.
examples.en: Ignorance is the enemy; educate yourself.
examples.sw: Ujinga ni adui; jisome.
